general_farming.topic: ∆êy…õ d…õn na wotwitwa kookoo nnua yie
general_farming.answer: Twitwa kookoo nnua mp…õn 2‚Äì3 afe biara mu. Yi mman a awu, yare…õ aka, ne de…õ …õtwere so. Ma dua no sorok…î ny…õ meters 4‚Äì5 na woatumi ahw…õ no yie. Twitwa pa ma mframa fa mu na …õtew yare…õ so. Twitwa w…î aboa akyi ber…õ a dua no ho nte…õ.

general_farming.topic: Sunsuma nnua a …õw…î kookoo afuo so
general_farming.answer: Ma sunsuma ny…õ 40‚Äì60% w…î kookoo afuo so. S…õ sunsuma no d…î…îso a, aba a dua no sow sua na yare…õ ba; s…õ …õsua dodo a, owia hyew nnua no.
